parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.description: Parameters for controlling execution of the pipeline.

run.description: Selectively run tests  as comma delimited values
run.help_text: Tests to run as comma delimited values. E.g. --skip TEST_SUCCESS,TEST_INPUT. Case insensitive. Note this excludes all other tests.

skip.description: Tests to skip as comma delimited values.
skip.help_text: Tests to skip as comma delimited values. E.g. --skip TEST_SUCCESS,TEST_INPUT. Case insensitive.

remoteFile.description: Path to remote file to download and use.
remoteFile.help_text: Path to a remote file to use within the pipeline. This mimics a remote set of files such as reference data that may need to be retrieved prior to analysis. By default this is not specified and the test is not ran, add a remote file using standard Nextflow filenaming to pull a file from your storage (e.g. an S3 bucket or shared storage).

container.help_text: Specifies the container URI. By default, this is an Ubuntu container on quay.io with no usage limits.

gpu.description: Whether to test GPU utilization within a process.

outdir.description: Path to use for publishing output files.
outdir.help_text: Path to a remote folder to publish files to. If not specified, this is a subfolder within the working directory but if specified it will publish files to the path specified in this parameter.

fusion_options.title: Fusion Filesystem Options
fusion_options.description: Configure Fusion filesystem validation and diagnostics.

fusion.description: Run Fusion filesystem diagnostics via 'fusion doctor'.
fusion.help_text: When enabled, run the TEST_FUSION_DOCTOR process to validate Fusion requirements.

fusion_cache_path.description: Filesystem path for Fusion cache directory.
fusion_cache_path.help_text: Specifies the directory where Fusion should cache data locally. Used by the diagnostics process to verify sufficient disk space is available.

fusion_read_only_buckets.description: Comma-separated list of read-only cloud storage buckets to validate access.
fusion_read_only_buckets.help_text: Comma-separated URIs of cloud storage buckets that require read-only access. The diagnostics process will validate if the task can read from these buckets. Supports AWS S3 (s3://), Google Cloud Storage (gs://), and Azure Blob Storage (az://). Example: 's3://reference-data,gs://shared-files'

fusion_read_write_buckets.description: Comma-separated list of read-write cloud storage buckets to validate access.
fusion_read_write_buckets.help_text: Comma-separated URIs of cloud storage buckets that require read-write access. The diagnostics process will validate if the task can read from and write to these buckets. Supports AWS S3 (s3://), Google Cloud Storage (gs://), and Azure Blob Storage (az://). Example: 's3://results,gs://output-data'
